nodes.title: Roadside Cairn
nodes.body: Rain needles across the trade road as you find a low cairn wrapped in old prayer-cords. One stone has been carved with neat, deliberate runes. Another sits loose enough to suggest a hidden latch beneath it.

choices.text: Study the runes for a pattern.

on_success.journal_add: The cairn's runes hide a passphrase used by dead-drop couriers: 'Dawn remembers'.

on_failure.journal_add: The weather smears the runes before you can fully map the pattern.

choices.text: Force the loose stone and test the latch.

on_success.journal_add: You force the latch with raw leverage and break the seal the hard way.

on_failure.journal_add: The stone shifts, but not enough. Your hands pay for the attempt.

choices.text: Mark the cairn on your map and leave it for later.

result.journal_add: You mark the cairn on your map for a return trip with better light and tools.

nodes.title: The Phrase Beneath the Weather
nodes.body: The chisel marks repeat in a courier's cipher. Once you see the pattern, the meaning is plain enough: speak the phrase, then press the western stone.

choices.text: Whisper 'Dawn remembers' and press the stone.

result.journal_add: The latch yields as if it has been waiting for the words all season.
You leave with the phrase committed to memory and the site still undisturbed.

nodes.title: Smudged Meaning
nodes.body: Whatever certainty lived in the runes is gone with the rain. You can keep testing the site by instinct, or back off before you damage something valuable.

result.journal_add: You note that the cairn likely conceals a mechanism, but the cipher needs a cleaner read.

nodes.title: Stone Wins
nodes.body: The loose slab bites back. There is a mechanism here, but brute force alone is not enough to solve it quickly.

choices.text: Step back and read the runes instead.

result.journal_add: You retreat from the cairn with a better sense of its stubborn construction.

nodes.title: Courier Cache
nodes.body: The western stone folds inward and reveals a narrow compartment. Inside are waxed notes, a broken signet, and a route ledger naming an archivist in Daggerford as the final recipient.

choices.text: Take the ledger and add the archivist lead to your journal.

result.journal_add: Recovered a route ledger pointing to an archivist in Daggerford. This is enough to start a proper quest thread.

choices.text: Reseal the cache after a quick look.

result.journal_add: You leave the ledger in place for now, but note the archivist's name and destination.

nodes.title: Quest Seed Logged
nodes.body: This slice ends with a concrete lead, a journal update, and a quest-state flag. From here the next scene could move to a world map, camp, or city hub conversation.

nodes.title: Leave It For Later
nodes.body: You step back onto the road with the cairn entered into your notes. This branch ends cleanly without advancing the quest, but the site remains available for a later return.
